name: Kenny Sailors Gym
description: Kenny Sailors Gym is a place to play pickleball in Laramie, WY. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. You can reserve the court. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Laramie Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Laramie Recreation Center in Laramie, WY! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Undine Park
description: Undine Park is a place to play pickleball in Laramie, WY. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: University of Wyoming Indoor Tennis Complex
description: University of Wyoming Indoor Tennis Complex is a place to play pickleball in Laramie, WY. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
